summary: zen module review against ADR-002 through ADR-007. Seven violations found across ADR-002 (Justfile Conventions), ADR-004 (Configuration Templating), and ADR-005 (Data Schema).

violations.description: ADR-002 requires all justfiles to use safe shell settings: set shell := ["bash", "-euo", "pipefail", "-c"]
violations.impact: Inconsistent shell behavior across recipes; potential for undetected errors
violations.required_action: Add shell setting at top of justfile

violations.description: ADR-002 section 5 defines standard recipes. zen/justfile is missing: clean, mktree, health, ls, build, template, test
violations.impact: Inconsistent module interface; operators cannot discover standard recipes; missing lifecycle management
violations.required_action: Implement missing recipes or define as null recipes per ADR-002 section 6

violations.description: ADR-002 section 7 requires recipes to be organized into standardized groups (lifecycle, info, build, service). zen/justfile has no recipe groups.
violations.impact: Recipe discovery via 'just --list --groups' will not work predictably

violations.description: ADR-002 section 4 requires all justfiles to import the shared library. zen/justfile uses local variables instead of importing from .build/just/lib.just
violations.impact: Shared library updates do not propagate; global values are duplicated

violations.description: ADR-005 requires all modules with configuration to have a data.yml file following the standardized schema
violations.impact: Cannot query configuration across modules; configuration is not discoverable; missing metadata for dependencies, ports, etc.
violations.required_action: Create data.yml following ADR-005 schema; include any applicable ports, domains, aliases, shell integrations, etc.

violations.description: ADR-004 section 6 requires all generated.* files to be gitignored. Root .gitignore is missing this pattern.
violations.impact: Generated files containing secrets or templated content could be accidentally committed
violations.required_action: Add 'generated.*' pattern to .gitignore at root level

violations.description: zen/README.md contains YAML frontmatter. Verify it conforms to any ADR documentation standards
violations.required_action: Cross-reference with ADR documentation standards (likely ADR-000 or ADR-001)

notes.adr_003_note: Module definition: zen is a leaf module managing Zen browser configuration. Has justfile, no child justfiles. Compliance: PASS
notes.adr_006_note: Secret management: zen/justfile contains 1Password configuration for 1Password browser extension setup. Justfile does not reference secrets in templates. Compliance: N/A (no template secrets found)
notes.adr_007_note: Service module conventions: zen is not a service module (does not manage background processes). Compliance: N/A
